package com.consumer.priv;

// Tier-2 declared target with a private method - resolution is by name, any
// visibility. See Tier2PrivateQualifiedCapture.java.txt for the real call-site
// capture this drives (cal4-parity: unexported/private sinks still resolve).
public class PrivHolder {
    private void reportPriv(Throwable cause) {}
}
